content.text: Let me read the file first.

content.content:
1→# DDC/CI monitor input switching for Dell U4025QW.
     2→# Host-specific – import only on machines with a supported monitor.
     3→{ pkgs, ... }:
     4→
     5→{
     6→  home.packages = [
     7→    # Monitor input switching via DDC/CI (Dell U4025QW)
     8→    # VCP code 0x60 = Input Source. Values are monitor-specific;
     9→    # run `ddcutil capabilities` and `ddcutil getvcp 60` to discover them.
    10→    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "monitor-input" ''
    11→      #!/usr/bin/env bash
    12→      set -euo pipefail
    13→
    14→      usage() {
    15→        echo "Usage: monitor-input <dp|usbc>" >&2
    16→        exit 1
    17→      }
    18→
    19→      [ $# -eq 1 ] || usage
    20→
    21→      case "$1" in
    22→        dp)    value=0x0f; label="DisplayPort" ;;
    23→        usbc)  value=0x11; label="USB-C" ;;
    24→        *)     usage ;;
    25→      esac
    26→
    27→      if ddcutil setvcp 60 "$value"; then
    28→        notify-send "Monitor Input" "Switched to $label"
    29→      else
    30→        notify-send -u critical "Monitor Input" "Failed to switch to $label"
    31→        exit 1
    32→      fi
    33→    '')
    34→  ];
    35→
    36→  wayland.windowManager.hyprland.settings.bindd = [
    37→    # Monitor input switching (DDC/CI)
    38→    "SUPER ALT, 1, Switch monitor to DisplayPort, exec, monitor-input dp"
    39→    "SUPER ALT, 2, Switch monitor to USB-C, exec, monitor-input usbc"
    40→  ];
    41→}
    42→
The file /tmp/klaus-sessions/cosmo/20260317-2217-90f3/home/monitor-input.nix has been updated successfully.

input.old_string: "SUPER ALT, 2, Switch monitor to USB-C, exec, monitor-input usbc"
input.new_string: "SUPER ALT, 2, Switch monitor to Thunderbolt, exec, monitor-input tb"

1→# DDC/CI monitor input switching for Dell U4025QW.
     2→# Host-specific – import only on machines with a supported monitor.
     3→{ pkgs, ... }:
     4→
     5→{
     6→  home.packages = [
     7→    # Monitor input switching via DDC/CI (Dell U4025QW)
     8→    # VCP code 0x60 = Input Source. Values are monitor-specific;
     9→    # run `ddcutil capabilities` and `ddcutil getvcp 60` to discover them.
    10→    (pkgs.writeShellScriptBin "monitor-input" ''
    11→      #!/usr/bin/env bash
    12→      set -euo pipefail
    13→
    14→      usage() {
    15→        echo "Usage: monitor-input <dp|tb>" >&2
    16→        exit 1
    17→      }
    18→
    19→      [ $# -eq 1 ] || usage
    20→
    21→      case "$1" in
    22→        dp)    value=0x0f; label="DisplayPort" ;;
    23→        tb)    value=0x11; label="Thunderbolt" ;;
    24→        *)     usage ;;
    25→      esac
    26→
    27→      if ddcutil setvcp 60 "$value"; then
    28→        notify-send "Monitor Input" "Switched to $label"
    29→      else
    30→        notify-send -u critical "Monitor Input" "Failed to switch to $label"
    31→        exit 1
    32→      fi
    33→    '')

    35→

    37→    # Monitor input switching (DDC/CI)
    38→    "SUPER ALT, 1, Switch monitor to DisplayPort, exec, monitor-input dp"
    39→    "SUPER ALT, 2, Switch monitor to Thunderbolt, exec, monitor-input tb"

content.text: Looks good. All three references updated. Let me commit and push.

input.command:
git add home/monitor-input.nix && git commit -m "$(cat <<'EOF'
Rename USB-C monitor input option to Thunderbolt (tb)

The Dell U4025QW is connected via Thunderbolt, not USB-C.
Rename the 'usbc' option to 'tb', update labels and keybinding
descriptions accordingly. VCP value 0x11 remains the same.
EOF
)"

input.command:
gh pr create --title "Rename USB-C monitor input to Thunderbolt" --body "$(cat <<'EOF'
## Summary
- Rename the `usbc` monitor input option to `tb` (Thunderbolt) in `home/monitor-input.nix`
- Update usage string, case label, and Hyprland keybinding description
- VCP value 0x11 unchanged (Thunderbolt uses the same DDC/CI value on Dell U4025QW)

## Test plan
- [ ] Verify `monitor-input tb` switches the Dell U4025QW to the Thunderbolt input
- [ ] Verify `monitor-input dp` still works for DisplayPort
- [ ] Verify SUPER+ALT+2 keybinding triggers Thunderbolt switch

Run: 20260317-2217-90f3
EOF
)"

- `USB-C` → `Thunderbolt` (labels and keybinding description)
- Usage string updated to `dp|tb`
- VCP value `0x11` kept as-is
